genre_preference.value: drama, slice of life, mystery, anime
evidence: "This is a beautiful show, that has flawed characters grow as the episodes go forward."
"It's the same formula as the first two, and it works."
"This wasn't bad. You have to realize this is a film without a lot of dialogue."
"It's the story of a guy who slowly loses himself to loneliness."
"Gorgeously animated. Got me hooked enough to find the manga to read."
"The artwork of the backgrounds is gorgeous."
"I loved this movie. The source material is quite deep."

summary: The user enjoys visually stunning dramas and slice-of-life narratives, often appreciating deep emotional themes. They prefer slower pacing and simple storytelling, valuing high production quality in their viewing experiences.
